title: Hermes Agent Rust Rewrite Initial Commit
description: Lumio-Research publishes hermes-agent-rs, a production-grade multi-platform AI agent runtime rewritten in Rust featuring gateway adapters, tool orchestration, MCP support, memory plugins, and cost-safe autonomous loops.

title: Multi-Language Documentation Released
description: Hermes ships with README documentation in English, Chinese, Japanese, and Korean to support global developer adoption.

title: Gateway Messaging and WeChat Support
description: Hermes Gateway adds messaging platform adapters including WeChat (Weixin) iLink CDN integration, DingTalk ACK handling, and Python environment compatibility layer.

title: ACP Sessions and Memory Plugins
description: Hermes introduces Agent Communication Protocol (ACP) sessions, persistent memory plugins with write hooks, and context compaction with pre-compress memory hooks.

title: Cost Guardrails and Budget Controls
description: Hermes runtime adds cost guardrails with budget limits, token usage tracking, and automatic loop termination when spending thresholds are exceeded.

title: Session Search with LLM Summaries
description: Hermes memory system gains intelligent session search with LLM-generated summaries, lineage exclusion filters, hidden-source filtering, and dual-mode recall semantics.

title: Smart Runtime Routing
description: Hermes implements intelligent provider routing with automatic fallback chains, evolution cadence tracking, and external runtime parity alignment.

title: Gateway Setup Wizard and QR Login
description: Hermes Gateway adds interactive TUI setup wizard with credential guidance, WeChat QR code parity for mobile login, and stream controls for real-time monitoring.

title: Hook Payload Builders and Deferred Flush
description: Hermes Gateway improves with structured hook payload builders, cleanup automation, rate limits, and deferred flush mechanisms for high-throughput messaging.
